colorectal.title: Colorectal / Bowel
colorectal.subtitle: Fibre helps most. We'll flag processed and red meat.

breast.title: Breast
breast.subtitle: Plant-rich meals help. We'll flag alcohol and saturated fat.

prostate.title: Prostate
prostate.subtitle: Mediterranean-style meals help. We'll flag saturated fat.

stomach.title: Stomach / Gastric
stomach.subtitle: Less salt helps. We'll flag pickled and salt-cured foods.

other.title: Other / General
other.subtitle: General WCRF guidance. Plant-rich, less processed.

cancerSubtypeSubheading: Different types respond best to different foods. Your answer focuses what the scanner highlights.
cancerSubtypeReassurance: You can change this any time from your profile.

standard.title: Standard CF management
standard.subtitle: Calorie-dense foods help most. We'll flag 'diet' and low-fat products.

modulator.title: On a CFTR modulator
modulator.subtitle: Trikafta or Kaftrio. Absorption has improved, so we ease off the high-calorie push.

cfrd.title: CF-Related Diabetes (CFRD)
cfrd.subtitle: Keep the high-calorie diet. We'll add carb awareness for insulin.

all.title: All subtypes
all.subtitle: On a modulator with CFRD. We watch carbs but ease off the high-calorie push.

cfSubtypePrompt: Which best fits your CF right now?
cfSubtypeSubheading: Different treatments change the diet a lot. Your answer adjusts what we highlight.
cfSubtypeReassurance: You can change this any time in your profile.
